from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    # Simple template map for known predicates
    templates = {
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays in the {o} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s manager is {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} holds the position of {o}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s home ground is {o}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted by {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} meters tall",
        "youthclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} started at youth club {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started his active years in {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} debuted with {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was picked {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was selected in round {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "college": lambda s, o: f"{s} attended {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"The coach of {s} is {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"The owner of {s} is {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"The anthem of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"The ethnic groups in {s} include {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"The general manager of {s} is {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {s} is {o}",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"The season for {s} is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym for {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"The stadium of {s} is {o}",
        "universityTeam": lambda s, o: f"The university team of {s} is {o}",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f"The most championships belong to {o} in {s}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in the country {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"The UTC offset of {s} is {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"The time zone of {s} is {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"The total area of {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
    }

    # Group triples by their subject to form richer clauses
    from collections import defaultdict

    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for triple in triples:
        subject_map[triple.subject].append(triple)

    clauses = []
    for subj, triple_list in subject_map.items():
        # Aggregate objects for each predicate of the same subject
        pred_objects = {}
        for t in triple_list:
            pred_objects.setdefault(t.predicate, []).append(t.object)

        sub_parts = []
        for pred, objs in pred_objects.items():
            tmpl = templates.get(pred)
            if tmpl:
                if len(objs) == 1:
                    sub_parts.append(tmpl(subj, objs[0]))
                else:
                    # No template for multiple objects; fall back to a simple phrase
                    obj_str = " and ".join(objs)
                    sub_parts.append(f"{subj} {pred} {obj_str}")
            else:
                obj_str = " and ".join(objs)
                sub_parts.append(f"{subj} {pred} {obj_str}")

        # Combine parts for the same subject into a fluent clause
        if len(sub_parts) == 1:
            clause = sub_parts[0]
        else:
            clause = ", ".join(sub_parts[:-1]) + ", and " + sub_parts[-1]
        clauses.append(clause)

    if not clauses:
        return ""

    # Join different subject clauses with semicolons for readability
    sentence = "; ".join(clauses) + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
